Meta.title: APA™ — Accountable Partners for Africa
Meta.description: Africa's most trusted Governance, Risk & Compliance platform. 63 precision tools, 5-step GRC certification, 22-nation intelligence.

Journeys.title: Find Your Journey
Journeys.subtitle: Six role-based journeys — each with matched tools, proof and its entry point into the APA™ framework. Bilingual EN/FR.

items.heading: De-risk African capital deployment
items.body: Convert development intent into verifiable, institutionally-credible outcomes. APA satisfies IFC PS1-type governance conditions and compresses the risk premium 300–500 bps.
items.cta: Reduce my Trust Tax™ · Risk & Territory Audit

items.heading: Audit-shield your African supply chain
items.body: Meet CSDDD, the UK Bribery Act and LkSG with end-to-end, verifiable supplier accountability.

items.heading: A national enterprise governance standard
items.body: Embed APA as the verification layer that makes public-private projects bankable and auditable — the sovereign-to-enterprise chain.

items.heading: Turn grants into investment-grade outcomes
items.body: APA is the certification layer that converts grant-funded enterprises into institutionally bankable ones — capital 300–500 bps cheaper.

items.heading: Protect your name before you endorse
items.body: Test ethical brand compliance and embed a Moral Exit Clause before any endorsement contract.

items.heading: Deploy capital & expertise, accountably
items.body: A structured on-ramp to convert remittances and expertise into ethically-governed equity engagement.

Home.topbar: GRC Standard™ · Auditable · Pan-African · Bilingual FR/EN
Home.heroLead: APA™ — Africa's most trusted Governance, Risk & Compliance platform. 54 nations | 22 active countries | 63 precision tools | $80B+ FDI deficit addressed. APA™ turns accountability from a compliance burden into Africa's most powerful competitive advantage.
Home.execTitle: Executive Summary — Strategic Context & the Accountability Void™
Home.execContextBody: Africa's real GDP growth (~4.1% in 2025) ranks 2nd worldwide. Yet an institutional trust deficit costs the continent more than $80 billion/year in lost FDI — not from real risk, but from the absence of verifiable governance data.
Home.execVoidBody: The systemic gap where institutions lack verifiable trust signals, pushing capital away. Existing solutions fail in Africa: they apply Western frameworks without cultural calibration — checkboxes that produce reports, not trust.
Home.execWhyBody: APA™ operationalizes accountability through precision diagnostics, mandate enforcement and trust infrastructure. The Authenticity Premium™ makes it a measurable financial asset: certified enterprises save 300–500 basis points in cost of capital.
Home.arcTitle: 3-Beat Engagement Arc — Understand › Engage › Become Accountable
Home.arc1Body: Experience Africa directly. Ground-level access to the systems you want to transform.
Home.arc2Body: Understand the accountability architecture: C-SPA, MAE, CVP, Authenticity Premium™ and σ-suppression.
Home.arc3Body: Launch the C-SPA diagnostic and complete the 5-step pathway to the verifiable GRC certificate.

Tools.title: The 63 GRC Tools & Mandates — Complete Suite
Tools.intro: APA™'s proprietary GRC suite counts 63 tools, organized in 6 strategic pillars. Each tool is presented with its official number (out of 63), its title and its description. Every tool sheet has a complete source document (purpose, mandatory features, strategic benefits, assessment questions).

items.name: Executive Transition Diagnostic

items.name: Risk & Territory Audit
items.desc: Catalogs grievances, quantifies the trust deficit. → Trust Deficit Index.

items.name: Decolonized Impact Assessment

items.name: Institutional Capital Gateway

items.name: SME Integrity Pipeline

Certification.title: Certification Portal & Trust Audit

steps.name: C-SPA Diagnostic
steps.desc: Score ≥70 required; Colonial Architecture Alert if below.

steps.name: Trust Audit & Mapping
steps.desc: Grievance catalog, Trust Deficit Index assigned by the APA team.

steps.name: Kinship Equity Agreement
steps.desc: Legally binding co-ownership instruments, under the APA co-governance framework.

steps.name: CVP Activation & σ-Suppression
steps.desc: The Community Verification Portal goes live; real-time consent matrix; leakage coefficient tracking.

steps.name: APA™ GRC Certification Awarded
steps.desc: Authenticity Premium™ seal + compliance certificate verifiable by DFIs & MDBs.

Certification.criteria: C-SPA score ≥ 70 · Trust Deficit Index assessed & accepted · Kinship Equity Agreement executed · CVP live with live σ-tracking → self-issued certificate (Authenticity Premium™ seal + public verification URL).
Certification.formNote: Diagnostic preview — the full journey opens after sign-in.

About.title: About APA™ — Mission, Vision & Values
About.mission: Eliminate the Accountability Void in African institutions by delivering precision GRC tools, trained champions and verifiable trust infrastructure across 54 nations.
About.vision: A continent where every African enterprise — from the Dakar cooperative to the Nairobi fintech — accesses global capital at fair rates, backed by verifiable governance data reflecting local reality.
About.valueProp: The APA™ Framework decolonizes the metrics of trust — replacing Western checkboxes with verifiable, contextualized indicators that resonate locally while satisfying global institutional standards.

advisors.name: Prof. James Otieno
advisors.profile: Former World Bank Director, Africa Division. 30+ years in governance & accountability.

advisors.name: Dr. Fatima Diallo
advisors.profile: AU Commissioner for Political Affairs. Democracy & accountability specialist.

advisors.name: Mr. Emmanuel Nkrumah
advisors.profile: IFC Regional Director, West Africa. FDI facilitation & institutional reform.

advisors.name: Dr. Amina Osei
advisors.profile: Former IMF Senior Economist. Fiscal governance & transparency expert.

advisors.name: Prof. Leila Mansouri
advisors.profile: Harvard Kennedy School. Rule of law & MENA governance specialist.

advisors.name: Mr. Charles Mutua
advisors.profile: Partner, McKinsey Africa. Institutional reform & capacity building.

founders.name: Aisha Babangida
founders.bio: A leading pan-African humanitarian and philanthropist, she conceived APA™'s founding mandate: structurally empowering women and radically decolonizing development in Africa. Building on the Women Enterprise Alliance (WenA) and the Better Life Program for the African Rural Woman, she steers the strategy toward the integration of endogenous knowledge systems.

founders.name: Pape Samb
founders.role: Co-Founder | CEO | Principal Architect — GRC Strategist
founders.bio: An international strategic leader and systemic investment expert, he is the designer and principal architect of the APA™ methodology and its 63-tool GRC suite. As CEO, he designed the Authenticity Premium™, Trust Tax™ and Sigma-Suppression™ frameworks. Architect of the CVP and the 10-Year Change Dashboard. 15+ years in governance, risk & compliance across Francophone Africa.
